errors.security_verification_failed: Security verification failed. Please try again.

confirm_email.title: Check your email
confirm_email.message: We’ve sent you a sign-in link. Click it to complete your sign-in.
confirm_email.spam_hint: If you don’t see the email, check your spam folder.

errors.logout: Failed to log out. Please try again.
errors.magic_link: Failed to generate sign-in link. Please try again.

results.empty: No businesses found for the given industry and location.

errors.failed: Failed to find businesses. Please try again.

errors.gmail_already_connected: This Gmail account is already connected to another account.
errors.different_google_account: You cannot connect a different Google account than the one already linked.
errors.gmail_general: An error occurred while connecting Gmail. Please try again.
errors.logout_all: Failed to log out all sessions. Please try again.
errors.delete_account: Failed to delete your account. Please try again.

success.logout_all: All other sessions have been signed out.

account_deletion.title: Account deletion
account_deletion.warning: Your account will be deleted and moved to a recovery period of 30 days. During this time, you can restore it. After 30 days, it will be permanently deleted.
account_deletion.success: Your account has been deleted. You can restore it by signing in within 30 days.
account_deletion.restored: Your account has been restored. Welcome back.
